resourceTemplates.name: google-ad-library-search-advertisers
resourceTemplates.title: Search Google advertisers
resourceTemplates.description: Searches the Google Ad Transparency Library for advertisers and returns advertiser identifiers. Supports pagination with `cursor` when available.

resourceTemplates.name: google-ad-library-company-ads
resourceTemplates.title: Get Google company ads
resourceTemplates.description: Returns public ads for a Google advertiser id. Supports pagination with `cursor`.

resourceTemplates.name: google-ad-library-ad-details
resourceTemplates.title: Get Google ad details
resourceTemplates.description: Returns details for a specific Google Ad Transparency ad by `ad_id`.
